zh.lifeSummary: 當Guichard I de Beaujeu於0980年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯o波奧時，他的父親Humbert I de Beaujeu24歲，母親Hermelt emelde countess of beaujeau33歲。他於大約0999年與Adélaïde Emelde在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯o波奧結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1035年在他的家鄉享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guichard I de Beaujeu于0980年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯o波奧时，他的父亲Humbert I de Beaujeu24岁，母亲Hermelt emelde countess of beaujeau33岁。他于大约0999年与Adélaïde Emelde在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯o波奧结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1035年在他的家乡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guichard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Betrand, Gilles, Michel, Thierry.  Spanish Alvaro, Julio, Ramon, Alicia, Ana Maria, Elena, Juan, Maria Luisa, Osvaldo.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Wichard, composed of the elements wīg ‘battle, combat’ + hard ‘hardy, strong’.

en.lifeSummary: When Guichard I de Beaujeu was born in 0980, in Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Humbert I de Beaujeu, was 24 and his mother, Hermelt emelde countess of beaujeau, was 33. He married Adélaïde Emelde about 0999, in Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1035, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guichard I de Beaujeu est né en 0980, à Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Humbert I de Beaujeu, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Hermelt emelde countess of beaujeau, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Adélaïde Emelde environ 0999, à Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1035, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.Chênehutte-Trèves-Cunault, Maine-et-Loir: Chênehutte-Trèves-Cunault, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Guichard I de Beaujeu 0980 in Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Humbert I de Beaujeu 24 und seine Mutter Hermelt emelde countess of beaujeau 33. Er hat um 0999 in Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Adélaïde Emelde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1035 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Adélaïde Emelde circa 0999, nel Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1035, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guichard I de Beaujeuが0980年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスルhoンビーウジェウで生まれた時，父Humbert I de Beaujeuは24歳，母Hermelt emelde countess of beaujeauは33歳であった。約0999年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスルhoンビーウジェウでAdélaïde Emeldeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1035年に故郷で55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guichard I de Beaujeu(이)가 0980년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 ho니 보j우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humbert I de Beaujeu(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Hermelt emelde countess of beaujeau(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 0999년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 ho니 보j우에서 Adélaïde Emelde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1035년 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guichard I de Beaujeu nasceu em 0980, em Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Humbert I de Beaujeu, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Hermelt emelde countess of beaujeau, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Adélaïde Emelde aproximadamente 0999, em Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1035, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.Chênehutte-Trèves-Cunault, Maine-et-Loir: чeнэутте-трeвес-кунаулт, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guichard I de Beaujeu родился в 0980 г. в местности боджеу, рoн, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Humbert I de Beaujeu было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Hermelt emelde countess of beaujeau, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Adélaïde Emelde около 0999 г. в местности боджеу, рoн, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1035 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

Se casó con Adélaïde Emelde aproximadamente 0999, en Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1035, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
